# RANDSUM

> TypeScript-first dice notation ecosystem for tabletop RPGs. Zero-dependency, full notation support, game-specific packages.

RANDSUM provides TypeScript packages for dice rolling in tabletop RPG applications. The core engine supports advanced dice notation; game-specific packages add interpretation layers.

## Core Package

- [roller](https://randsum.dev/packages/roller/): `@randsum/roller` — core dice engine, zero dependencies, full notation support
  - Install: `bun add @randsum/roller` or `npm install @randsum/roller`
  - [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@randsum/roller) | [source](https://github.com/RANDSUM/randsum/tree/main/packages/roller)

## Game Packages

- [Blades in the Dark](https://randsum.dev/games/blades/): `@randsum/blades` — action roll resolution (dice pool, 1–4 dice)
- [Daggerheart](https://randsum.dev/games/daggerheart/): `@randsum/daggerheart` — Hope/Fear dual-die mechanics
- [D&D 5th Edition](https://randsum.dev/games/fifth/): `@randsum/fifth` — d20 rolls with advantage/disadvantage
- [Root RPG](https://randsum.dev/games/root-rpg/): `@randsum/root-rpg` — 2d6 Strong Hit / Weak Hit / Miss
- [Salvage Union](https://randsum.dev/games/salvageunion/): `@randsum/salvageunion` — d20 table lookups
- [Powered by the Apocalypse](https://randsum.dev/games/pbta/): `@randsum/pbta` — 2d6 strong hit / weak hit / miss with stat and forward/ongoing bonuses

## Tools

- [Component Library](https://randsum.dev/tools/components/): `@randsum/component-library` — React dice roller UI components
- [Discord Bot](https://randsum.dev/tools/discord-bot/): slash commands for all RANDSUM packages
- [LLM Skill](https://randsum.dev/tools/skill/): prompt file for teaching RANDSUM dice notation to any LLM

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://randsum.dev/getting-started/introduction/)
- [Dice Notation Reference](https://randsum.dev/reference/dice-notation/)
- [Roll Options Reference](https://randsum.dev/reference/roll-options/)
- [Modifiers Reference](https://randsum.dev/reference/modifiers/)
- [FAQ](https://randsum.dev/getting-started/faq/)
- [Recipes](https://randsum.dev/guides/recipes/)

## Dice Notation Quick Reference

RANDSUM uses extended standard dice notation (case-insensitive):

| Notation | Description | Example |
|----------|-------------|---------|
| `NdS` | Roll N dice with S sides | `4d6` |
| `+X` / `-X` | Add/subtract from total | `1d20+5` |
| `L` / `L2` | Drop lowest 1 / 2 | `4d6L` |
| `H` / `H2` | Drop highest 1 / 2 | `4d20H2` |
| `K` / `K3` | Keep highest 1 / 3 | `4d6K3` |
| `kl` / `kl2` | Keep lowest 1 / 2 | `2d20kl` |
| `R{<N}` | Reroll under N | `4d6R{<3}` |
| `R{>N}` | Reroll over N | `4d20R{>17}` |
| `!` | Exploding dice | `3d6!` |
| `!!` | Compounding exploding | `3d6!!` |
| `!p` | Penetrating exploding | `3d6!p` |
| `U` | Unique results | `4d20U` |
| `C{>N}` | Cap over N | `4d20C{>18}` |
| `C{<N}` | Cap under N | `4d20C{<3}` |
| `V{X=Y}` | Replace X with Y | `4d20V{1=20}` |
| `S{N}` | Count successes >= N | `5d10S{7}` |
| `*N` | Pre-arithmetic multiply | `2d6*2+3` |
| `**N` | Total multiply | `2d6+3**2` |

Common patterns:
- `roll('4d6L')` — D&D ability score (drop lowest)
- `roll('2d20H')` — advantage (keep highest)
- `roll('2d20L')` — disadvantage (keep lowest)
- `roll('4d6L', '4d6L', '4d6L', '4d6L', '4d6L', '4d6L')` — full 6-stat character generation

## TypeScript Usage

```typescript
import { roll } from '@randsum/roller'

// Number: roll single die
roll(20)              // 1d20

// String notation
roll('4d6L')          // 4d6, drop lowest
roll('2d20H')         // advantage
roll('2d20L')         // disadvantage

// Options object
roll({ sides: 6, quantity: 4, modifiers: { drop: { lowest: 1 } } })

// Multiple groups
roll('1d20+5', '2d6+3')  // attack + damage
```
